title: storage — feature keys
description: Tenant-facing capabilities gated by plan tier. Enforcement happens at the middleware / policy layer via feature-flag checks; tenant admins CANNOT toggle these directly — they're plan-tier expressions.

features.description: tus.io + S3 multipart support for files > 100MB. Plans without this capability reject uploads larger than the direct-upload ceiling.
Async thumbnail / medium / hero generation on image uploads. Free tier skips variants — shows a single scaled-in-browser version.
First-page thumbnail extraction from PDF uploads.
Issue long-TTL (up to 7d) signed URLs for external sharing (reason=share). Requires tenant admin permission to issue.
Restrict signed URLs to a CIDR range.
ClamAV / S3-antivirus scan on every upload. Enterprise-tier tenants additionally receive quarantine notifications + rescan-on-signature-update.
Enterprise-tier tenants can declare `#[FileKind(dedupable: false)]` on sensitive kinds — no cross-tenant physical byte sharing.
Signed URLs point at CloudFront / Cloudflare instead of raw S3.
Override the platform-default retention window per file kind via tenant settings.
Route uploads to EU-only S3 bucket + require EU-only CDN edges. Compliance requirement for GDPR-conscious tenants.
